# Little Souls — full URL index (llms-full.txt)

> Little Souls: personalised cosmic pet "soul readings" (birth-chart astrology for any pet) and Pawtraits — custom painted pet portraits in 20+ styles, including the signature cosmic-astrology style. 4.9/5 across 71 verified reviews. Printed locally UK/EU/USA.

## Core
- https://www.littlesouls.app/ — soul readings, start here
- https://www.littlesouls.app/pawtraits — custom pet portraits
- https://www.littlesouls.app/pawtraits/gallery — portrait gallery
- https://www.littlesouls.app/blog — pet astrology blog
- https://www.littlesouls.app/gift-v2 — gift a reading

## Pawtraits — breeds (custom portrait, any style)
